items.title: Ethereum vs Solana – No chain has defensible ‘moat’ yet, warns Wintermute CEO
items.whyYouShouldCare: The lack of a clear competitive advantage for Ethereum and Solana suggests both chains need to innovate to attract and retain users.

items.title: Solana stalls despite $1.8B RWA growth – Where is SOL’s liquidity going?
items.whyYouShouldCare: Despite significant growth in real-world assets, Solana's liquidity challenges indicate potential issues in user engagement and ecosystem health.

items.title: Solana Foundation president says crypto gaming is dead
items.whyYouShouldCare: The Solana Foundation president's comments on crypto gaming signal a shift in focus, which could impact developer interest and project funding in the ecosystem.
